name: che-word-mcp
description: Word MCP Server - Swift 原生 OOXML 操作，233 個工具。v3.13.8 bump ooxml-swift v0.19.7→v0.19.8 — A-CONT-2 mini-mini-cycle of #58 closes 2 P0 + 1 P1 from sub-stack A-CONT 6-AI verify（getBookmarks() now walks container bodyChildren across headers/footers/footnotes/endnotes; parseContainerChildBodyChildren now has 'case sdt' recursion mirroring parseBodyChildren; deleteBookmark() now symmetric with getBookmarks()）。Sub-cycle 3 for #58 (A → A-CONT → A-CONT-2). Same convergence-cycle pattern as R5→R5-CONT-4 (5 sub-cycles for #56). v3.13.7 A-CONT mini-cycle (parser-side mirror); v3.13.6 sub-stack A 初始 fix。B re-numbered to v3.13.9 / #59 whitespace overlay; C unchanged v3.14.0 / #60。基於 ooxml-swift v0.19.8。
